case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. ANTHONY ANIES et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE VENUE & RE REDUCED FILING FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-22-2014 CONTINUED TO DEC-23-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUL-22-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ANIES, ANTHONY
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 16194067) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ANIES, ANTHONY
DECLARATION SARAH A. ROBINSON-MCELROY FILED RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST, COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION MOLLY KAMPA FILED RE: CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-22-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ANIES, ANTHONY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-23-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED JUN-13-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ANIES, ANTHONY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANIES, ANTHONY $1,598.41 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,598.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ANIES, ANTHONY

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ANIES, ANTHONY DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-02-2014
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ANIES, ANTHONY
